pi_items.verified_value: Library of Congress Sanborn Fire Insurance Maps

privileged_info_summary: The historical San Francisco street grid northwest of Market Street is oriented 9 degrees off from cardinal directions. The latitude for downtown San Francisco is approximately 37.77. The map used is from the Library of Congress Sanborn Fire Insurance Maps collection, specifically identifier pm007860.
